title: Cutlery Set, 24 Piece Hammered Flatware Cutlery Sets, Stainless Steel Silverware Set for Home/Office/Party, Knife Fork Spoon Eating Utensils Set Service for 6, Mirror Polish & Dishwasher Safe
features: ※CUTLERY SET FOR 6// 24pcs includes (6) dinner knives, (6) dinner forks, (6) dinner spoons, and (6) teaspoons, Unique design suitable for all casual or formal dining, Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning
※HIGH QUALITY SILVERWARE// This 24-piece sets of cutlery is made of food grade 18/0 stainless steel without any chemical materials, Anti-rust, Healthy and reliable for daily reliable use
※EXQUISITE CRAFT// With solid construction, These metal flatware set have a proper weight for comfortable grip in hands, Not too heavy and not flimsy, Sleek edge without sharp spots safety in use
※HAMMERED FLATWARE// Combines classic with contemporary, Elegant and timeless design blends with hammered handle, Smooth mirror polished always maintain glossy, Fits your kitchen dinnerware
※UTILITY EATING UTENSILS// Quantities of 24 pc set perfect for family use, conferences, restaurant, camping, picnic, travel, bbq, wedding, festivals, A terrific gift for your family and friends
description: Product Description Have you ever had the pleasure of using a set of dining utensils so elegant, that they actually drew your attention and etched themselves in your memory? Are you tired of buying not that good, dull-looking and poor quality flatware set that rust or bend within the first months of use? Wouldn't you prefer a safe and high quality stainless steel knife fork spoon set that will be with you for years to come, and never lose its sheen? 24-Piece Stainless Steel Hammered Cutlery Sets, Consists of 6 pieces of each of your dining table necessities, Included 6 dinner knives, 6 dinner forks, 6 dinner spoons and 6 teaspoons, made of premium stainless steel to ensure health and durability, Gorgeous hammered patterns on each handle is timeless and never fall off, Smooth edge and proper weight is comfortable used for adults and teenager. Suitable for daily use, summer camp, dorm, reception, banquet, entertaining, buffet and more. Please rest assured that TeamFar Hammered Flatware Set won’t let you down(^ᴗ^) No Doubt that You Would Choose Hammered Design Cutlery Using durable, rustproof and healthy stainless steel materials that doesn't leach toxins, Hammered tecture handles and mirror polished surface, Dishwasher safe for delightfully cleaning, Definitely better than other cheaply-made silverware. Modern Cutlery Set RUST FREE - Made of 18/0 rustproof stainless steel to ensure health and durability for years HEALTHY - First-rate materials without other chemical coatings, Non-toxic and no metal taste STURDY - Heavy duty and thick, won’t bend or wrap, perfect balanced when holding in hands Deluxe Flatware Set CRAFT - Smooth mirror finish surface, 420 hard stainless steel ensures sharp knife blade TIMELESS - Pretty hammered handle won’t peel off after heavy use, perfect for any occasion use UTILITY - Quantities of 24pcs of eating utensils set, bring more joy to your dining experience Versatile Silverware Set GIFT - Makes a lovely present for weddings, housewarmings, birthday, Thanksgiving or Christmas MULTI USE - Great for students, get-togethers, party, conference, picnic, office, café, etc PRATICAL - A preferred choice when you need extra flatware set for your other purposes need Have an Elegant Dining Experience with Hammered Design Cutlery Set Solid constructed from high quality stainless steel, Healthy, durable and corrosion resistant for years to come. Smooth mirror finished always remains its sheen and add a sense of sparkle to your table, Beautiful hammered decorations pair well with your contemporary dinnerware utensils, Easy clean and dishwasher for hassle-free cleaning. Stainless Steel Flatware Set Service For 6 This versatile eating utensils Included 6 dinner knives, 6 dinner forks, 6 dinner spoons and 6 teaspoons, Its unique hammered design make it look like luxury restaurant or hotel silverware, A smart choice when you need extra stainless steel cutlery sets for dining with your family or closed friends. Product Dimension 23 cm Dinner Knife x 6 20 cm Dinner Fork x 6 20 cm Dinner Spoon x 6 13.5 cm Teaspoon x 6 Healthy Materials Adopt safe and pure stainless steel without toxic substances, Durable and corrosion resistant for years to come, Perfect for all ages Hammered Design Stylish hammered handle is designed to beautifully blend into any table setting, Never worry about the hammer will flake off or peel off Sturdy Structure Solid construction prevent this utensils from snapping even when used for hard applications, A great replacement of cheap-made flatware Nice Workmanship Smooth edge and perfect curve comfortable to hold in hands, Serrated knife blade cut food efficiently and four tines poke food easily
